subject: A robed figure struck mid-cast by a violent burst of red lightning, body arched backward as electricity crackles around them
description: A figure in dark blue robes is caught at the moment of being struck by a sudden, jagged bolt of red-orange lightning. The body is arched backward and the head thrown back, hair or hood flailing as electricity crackles outward in chaotic forking branches. The strike radiates from the figure's torso/upper body, lighting up the surrounding space in an explosive flash. The background is a pale, washed-out haze of crimson and dust, with no clear horizon — the entire frame is dominated by the violent burst of energy and motion. Composition is tight and chaotic, the lightning shapes filling most of the scene.
foreground: robed figure being struck by red lightning, arched backward in shock
background: hazy red-orange flash of energy with no clear horizon, dust and smoke
emotion: shock, sudden violent surprise, body recoiling at the moment of impact
